verses.text: Ta pil in a pa' hilhna mang a, a kihisak mi in a khial min pua nuamlo hi
Mihoihte in a kam siamna bangun thaman sang a, mizuaute pen siattat ding bek ut uh hi
Pau a ki-ipzo mi in a nuntakna a hu hi a, a mawk paupau mi pen amah a kisiasak tawm ahi hi
Thadah mi in a deih ngahzo lo a, nasep hahkat mi in a deih khempeuh ngahzo hi
Thuman mi in zuauthu deihlo a, a gilo mi in gensiatna leh mindaina ding bek a pau hi
Thumanna in midikte hu a, gitlohna pen mawhneite' pukna ahi hi
Mi pawlkhatte, zawng napi-in kihausak uh a, mi pawlkhatte, hau napi-in kizawngsak uh hi
Mihaupa' sum hauhna in a nuntakna tankhiazo a, mizawngpa in a kitatna ding bangmah neilo hi
Thuman mite khuavak bangin taang lela a, migilote meivak bangin mitpak hi
Hilh ding utlo, kihihsakna in kitotna bek piangsak thei a, hong kithuhilh ding utna pen a hoihzaw ahi hi
Ol takin hauhpakna oltak mahin kiamkik pah a, haksapi-in hauhtohna khangto semsem hi
Lamet tun'lohna in lungsim cinasak a, deihna tangtun'na pen lungdamna ahi hi
Thu kihilh ding utlohna pen siat ding utna hi a, thu kihilhna zuihna pen lungnopna ahi hi
Mipilte' thuhilhna pen nuntakna tuinak bang hi a, sihna thang tawh kipelhna ahi hi
Thungaihsut theihna maipha ngahna hi a, zuautatna in lungkhamna bek piangsak hi
Thungaihsun theite pilna tawh gamta a, mihaite in a haina taangko hi
Kamtai ginalo in mi lungkhamsak a, a citak thupuapa in mi lungdamsak kik hi
Thukihilhna a zuilo mi in zawn'na leh mindaina ngah a, thukihilhna a zui mi in minphatna leh pahtawina a ngah hi
Deihna ngahna in lungsim nuamsak a, siat gamtatna panin mihaite pialkhia nuamlo hi
Mipil tawh kikhawl lecin na pil ding a, mihai tawh kikhawl lecin gimna na thuak ding hi
Tuahsiatna in mawhneite sulzuih kawikawi a, midikte tuahpha kawikawi hi
Midikte in a tu a tate' luah ding gamh nei uh a, mawhneite' neihsate ahih leh midikte-a' ding hi lel hi
Lo thak panin mizawngte' khamkhop ding an piangkha ding a, ahi zongin thumanlohna hangin tua nangawn maimang thei ding hi
A ta a tai nuamlote a ta mudah hi a, a ta a itte in limtakin thuhilhin a tai hi
Thuman mi in a kham ding nei-in gilvah a, a gilo mi in nektawm ding neiloin a gil a kial hi.
